title: centella glauca
intro: Centella glauca, also known as black arum or water arum, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Arum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centella glauca are attributed to its ability to improve cognitive function, promote wound healing, and support skin health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Centella glauca is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and creams, and can be found in some traditional Chinese medicine and Ayurvedic practices.
